blocks.text: Woodland leads at -13, Højgaard lurking two back at -10. Best Norwegian is Jaeger at T32 (-5) — Reitan and Ventura both at +4, out of contention. Final round Sunday.
🚴 Sun 11:00 — Gent-Wevelgem: Wærenskjold, Abrahamsen and Hoelgaard in cobbles and crosswind classic
♟️ Wed 16:00 — FIDE Candidates R1: Magnus Carlsen opens his World Championship challenger campaign
